english: n. a feeling of being excited
example: Jimmy looked at the old men with excitement.

english: n. a desire to know or learn
example: They looked back at Jimmy with curiosity.

english: adj. feeling as if you are spinning and about to fall
example: Jimmy was starting to feel dizzy.
He exclaimed while all the noises were spinning around in his head.

english: n. a feeling of being very surprised or amazed
example: The bearded man looked at Jimmy in amazement.
You've locked the storm in your head.

english: v. to set someone or something free
example: I mean you have to release your ideas out of your head.

english: adj. easy to see or notice
v. to make or create something
example: Your thoughts grew and grew until they formed a huge storm.
The strong twister is lifting you up right now.
